statement: In every magma, Equation 1433 (`x = (x * x) * (y * (x * z))`) implies Equation 1859 (`x = (x * (y * y)) * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0414
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x x) (op y (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x (op y y)) (op x z))
